meta.race_name: Create Your Bet Builders At Midnite Handicap

rankings.name: I Need Your Love
key_positive_factors: Consistent runner-up finishes in recent AW starts
Proven over 5f and 6f at this level
Handled by a high-RTF stable (53.85%)
key_risks: Creeping up in the weights without winning
Vulnerable to a more well-handicapped improver

rankings.name: Shalaa Asker
key_positive_factors: Three-time 5f winner this winter including C&D
Tom Marquand booked for the ride
Maintains a high RPR of 81
key_risks: Stepping up from Class 6 company
Below par effort at Chelmsford on latest outing

rankings.name: The Fixer
key_positive_factors: Joint-highest Top Speed rating in the field (78)
Now 5lb lower than when placed twice over C&D in late 2025
Tactical speed suited to this 5f test
key_risks: Poor performances in last two starts finishing at the tail of the field
Requires a significant bounce-back in form

rankings.name: Toomuchforme
key_positive_factors: Improving RPR trend (latest 82)
Recent Newcastle 3rd suggests a return to competitive form
Effective with the first-time visor retained
key_risks: Stepping back up into Class 5 grade
0-10 record as a maiden

rankings.name: Keldeo
key_positive_factors: Solid C&D form with a high Top Speed (78)
Running off a handy mark (OR 70)
High-class potential relative to this field
key_risks: Returning from a 169-day layoff
Poor historical record when running fresh

rankings.name: Birkenhead
key_positive_factors: Reliable front-runner with C&D experience
Second twice over C&D recently off similar marks
David Nolan is a positive jockey booking
key_risks: Form dipped on latest start
Often vulnerable to late closers

rankings.name: Lucius Aurelius
key_positive_factors: Cheekpieces return today after a fair comeback run
Promising history at this track despite being a maiden
High-RTF stable (66.67%)
key_risks: Exposed 14-race maiden
Poor Top Speed rating (50) relative to market leaders

rankings.name: Darlo Pride
key_positive_factors: Strong Top Speed rating (76) suggests untapped ability
Shaped well on return from absence in December
High stable RTF (80%)
key_risks: Hasn't built on encouraging return in three subsequent runs
Needs to prove consistency

rankings.name: Popular Dream
key_positive_factors: Back to last winning mark
Track conditions at Southwell more suitable than latest Wolverhampton run
High stable RTF (66.67%)
key_risks: Losing run mounting up
Draw in stall 7 might be awkward for a bold bid

rankings.name: Woolridge
key_positive_factors: Attracted market support on stable debut
Respectable TS of 72
Handy 5lb claimer helps with the weight
key_risks: Very low-key stable debut last week
Maiden record (0-9) is off-putting

rankings.name: Herakles
key_positive_factors: Handy mark of 63
Respectable RPR (81) and TS (73)
Stable is historically successful at Southwell
key_risks: Returning from a 123-day break
Entire AW form is localized to Newcastle

rankings.name: Filly's Last Lady
key_positive_factors: Low mileage as a 5-year-old
Won first two handicap starts last summer
key_risks: Returning from a 159-day absence
Lowest Top Speed in the field (53)
Poor effort on AW debut

mordin.market_sentiment_flag: The model is under-trusting market favorites (Shalaa Asker, Toomuchforme, Lucius Aurelius) while over-trusting the second favorite (I Need Your Love) and significantly over-trusting mid-market outlier The Fixer.
